extraction.one_line_summary: VAN DER POEL Mathieu won Stage 3 with an intermediate sprint-style finish, making the final climb hard but unable to reduce the group below 30-40 riders.
tactical_patterns: VAN DER POEL Mathieu attempted selection on final climb but 30-40 riders remained, revealing insufficient gradient for pure climbers' advantage.
Sprint contested one lap before finish rather than traditional finale, suggesting technical circuit finish rewarded positioning over pure speed.

rider_signals.VAN DER POEL Mathieu: positive: back-to-back stage wins with team doing 'really big effort' suggests Alpecin-Fenix controlling race despite numerical disadvantage
